title: Fly Paper Fly Strips Fly Catcher Strips 16 Pack Sticky Fruit Fly Trap for House Indoor Outdoor Use
bullet_points: 【Strong adhesive】The red string and paper roll are not easy to break because we use good material. Sticky on both sides.
【Target】Control flies, mosquitoes, gypsy moth and other flying insects. Make your house clear.
【Eco Friendly】Indoor and outdoor use, non-toxic and safe to use around children and pets. In case of contact with sticky material, wash hands with soap and water.
【Easy to use】Hanging them next to an attractant will make best effect. Avoid dirty your hand, just pull-out tubes. No Baiting, No Poisons, No Vapors, No Mess.
【Note】Use vegetable oil and then cleaning agent to remove the glue from clothes or other articles in case of their contact with the adhesive.
